mapper.sql: id , post_id , parent_id , member_id , content , writer , delete_yn , created_date , modified_date
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_comment WHERE id = #{value} AND delete_yn = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_comment SET delete_yn = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pagination.limitStart}, #{recordSize}

SELECT
FROM tb_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND parent_id = #{value} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL
